title: The two-cell P0 projection is idempotent at the average level

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: Averaging the two projected coordinates gives the same average as the original two cell values.
assumptions: u0 and u1 are real cell values
both projected coordinates are the arithmetic mean
informal.expected_conclusion: The average after projection equals the original average.

declarations.name: cellAverage2
declarations.statement: def cellAverage2 (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := (u0 + u1) / 2

declarations.name: p0Projection2_idempotent
declarations.statement: theorem p0Projection2_idempotent (u0 u1 : Real) : cellAverage2 (p0Projection2Left u0 u1) (p0Projection2Right u0 u1) = cellAverage2 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate idempotence of the two-cell P0 projection at the average level into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem p0Projection2_idempotent (u0 u1 : Real) : cellAverage2 (p0Projection2Left u0 u1) (p0Projection2Right u0 u1) = cellAverage2 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the average and projected coordinates.
tasks.target: Unfold p0Projection2Left, p0Projection2Right, and cellAverage2, then use ring.
